title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure could disrupt critical business operations, compromise sensitive data, and lead to significant financial losses. Exploiting CI/CD pipelines increases the risk of widespread deployment across cloud environments.
recommended_actions: Implement strict access controls and monitor CI/CD pipelines for unusual activity.
Regularly update and patch cloud infrastructure and associated software to mitigate vulnerabilities.
Deploy advanced endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to identify and block ransomware attempts.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: A flaw has been found in Tenda 4G300 US_4G300V1.0Mt_V1.01.42_CN_TDC01. Affected is the function...
description: A flaw has been found in Tenda 4G300 US_4G300V1.0Mt_V1.01.42_CN_TDC01. Affected is the function sub_427C3C of the file /goform/SafeMacFilter. This manipulation of the argument page causes stack-based buffer overflow. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been published and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7470.

title: A vulnerability was detected in Tenda 4G300 US_4G300V1.0Mt_V1.01.42_CN_TDC01. This impacts the...
description: A vulnerability was detected in Tenda 4G300 US_4G300V1.0Mt_V1.01.42_CN_TDC01. This impacts the function sub_425A28 of the file /goform/DelFil. The manipulation of the argument delflag results in command injection. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Tenda 4G300 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via command injection, potentially compromising the device and its network. While the severity is marked as low, the public availability of the exploit increases the risk of exploitation.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest firmware update or patch from the vendor if available.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices from critical systems.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and block unauthorized access to the device.

Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the file src/managers/ResourceManager.ts of the component MCP Log Resource Handler. title: A weakness has been identified in BurtTheCoder mcp-dnstwist up to 1.0.4. Affected by this...
description: A weakness has been identified in BurtTheCoder mcp-dnstwist up to 1.0.4. Affected by this vulnerability is the function fuzz_domain of the file src/index.ts of the component MCP Interface. Executing a manipulation of the argument Request can lead to os command injection. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the mcp-dnstwist package up to version 1.0.4 allows for OS command injection via the fuzz_domain function. This could enable attackers to execute arbitrary commands on the underlying system, potentially leading to data breaches, system compromise, or lateral movement within the network. The public availability of the exploit increases the likelihood of attacks.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or patch the mcp-dnstwist package to a secure version if available. If no patch exists, consider temporarily removing or isolating the affected component.
Implement input validation and sanitization for all user-supplied data in the fuzz_domain function to prevent OS command injection.
Monitor systems for unusual activity, such as unexpected command executions, and review logs for signs of exploitation.

title: A vulnerability was identified in UTT HiPER 1250GW up to 3.2.7-210907-180535. This issue affects...
description: A vulnerability was identified in UTT HiPER 1250GW up to 3.2.7-210907-180535. This issue affects the function strcpy of the file route/goform/formTaskEdit_ap. The manipulation of the argument Profile leads to buffer overflow. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit is publicly available and might be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in UTT HiPER 1250GW allows remote attackers to exploit a buffer overflow via the 'Profile' argument in the 'formTaskEdit_ap' function, potentially leading to unauthorized access, system crashes, or execution of arbitrary code.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the firmware of UTT HiPER 1250GW devices to the latest version if available or apply vendor-provided patches.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices from critical systems and limit exposure to external threats.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and deploy intrusion detection/prevention systems to identify and block exploitation attempts.

title: A vulnerability was found in Algovate xhs-mcp 0.8.11. This affects the function...
description: A vulnerability was found in Algovate xhs-mcp 0.8.11. This affects the function xhs_publish_content of the file src/server/mcp.server.ts of the component MCP Interface. Performing a manipulation of the argument media_paths results in server-side request forgery. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Algovate xhs-mcp 0.8.11 allows server-side request forgery (SSRF), which could enable attackers to manipulate server requests, access internal systems, or exfiltrate sensitive data. The exploit is publicly available, increasing the likelihood of malicious use.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and sanitization for the 'media_paths' argument in the xhs_publish_content function to mitigate SSRF risks.
Monitor for unusual server activity and implement logging to detect potential exploitation attempts.
Engage with the vendor to expedite a patch or consider isolating the affected component until a fix is available.

title: Plack::Middleware::XSendfile versions through 1.0053 for Perl can allow client-controlled path...
description:
Plack::Middleware::XSendfile versions through 1.0053 for Perl can allow client-controlled path rewriting.

Plack::Middleware::XSendfile allows the variation setting (sendfile type) to be set by the client via the X-Sendfile-Type header, if it is not considered in the middleware constructor or the Plack environment.

A malicious client can set the X-Sendfile-Type header to "X-Accel-Redirect" to services running behind nginx reverse proxies, and then set the X-Accel-Mapping to map the path to an a

title: CKAN has Unauthenticated SQL Injection and Authorization Bypass in `datastore_search_sql`
description:
### Impact

A vulnerability in `datastore_search_sql` allowed attackers to inject SQL in order to gain access to private resources and PostgreSQL system information.

### Patches
The issue has been patched in CKAN 2.10.10 and CKAN 2.11.5

### Workarounds
Disable the DataStore SQL search (`ckan.datastore.sqlsearch.enabled = false`). Note that the SQL search is disabled by default.

### More information

As stated in the [documentation](https://docs.ckan.org/en/2.11/maintaining/configuration.html#

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to perform SQL injection, potentially exposing sensitive data, gaining unauthorized access to private resources, and retrieving PostgreSQL system information. This could lead to data breaches, privilege escalation, or further exploitation of the affected system.
affected_industries: Private Sector Entities using CKAN for Open Data Portals
recommended_actions: Immediately update CKAN to version 2.10.10 or 2.11.5, as these versions contain the necessary patches to address the vulnerability.
If upgrading is not immediately possible, disable the DataStore SQL search feature by setting `ckan.datastore.sqlsearch.enabled = false` in the CKAN configuration file.
Conduct a thorough review of logs and database activity to identify any signs of exploitation or unauthorized access.

title: Claude SDK for TypeScript has Insecure Default File Permissions in Local Filesystem Memory Tool
description: The `BetaLocalFilesystemMemoryTool` in the Anthropic TypeScript SDK created memory files and directories using the Node.js default modes (`0o666` for files, `0o777` for directories), leaving them world-readable on systems with a standard umask and world-writable in environments with a permissive umask such as many Docker base images. A local attacker on a shared host could read persisted agent state, and in containerized deployments could modify memory files to influence subsequent model behavio

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41686.

title: i18next-http-middleware has path traversal / SSRF via user-controlled language and namespace parameters
description:
### Summary

Versions of `i18next-http-middleware` prior to 3.9.3 pass the user-controlled `lng` and `ns` values from `getResourcesHandler` directly into `i18next.services.backendConnector.load(languages, namespaces, …)` without any sanitisation. Depending on which backend is configured, the unvalidated path segments enable one of two attacks:

- **Filesystem path traversal** when the middleware is paired with `i18next-fs-backend` (or any backend that interpolates `lng` / `ns` into a filesystem

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-42353.

title: netfoil's optional seccomp sandboxing was not applied
description:
### Summary
The optional flag `--filter-system-calls` was not applied even if specified.

### Details
This is a defense in depth feature to apply additional seccomp filters after the binary has started. The example config also sandboxes the binary with systemd.

### Impact
Reduced sandboxing of the netfoil binary.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The absence of the optional seccomp sandboxing reduces the defense-in-depth protections for the netfoil binary, potentially exposing it to exploitation if other vulnerabilities are present. However, this does not introduce a direct vulnerability but weakens the overall security posture.
recommended_actions: Verify and update the configuration to ensure the `--filter-system-calls` flag is correctly applied.
Conduct a review of other security measures in place to compensate for the reduced sandboxing, such as systemd sandboxing or additional runtime protections.
Monitor for updates or patches from the netfoil maintainers and apply them promptly when available.

description: IBM Guardium Data Protection 12.1 is vulnerable to cross-site scripting. This vulnerability allows an administrative user to embed arbitrary JavaScript code in the Web UI thus altering the intended functionality potentially leading to credentials disclosure within a trusted session.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an administrative user to inject arbitrary JavaScript into the Web UI, potentially leading to credential disclosure or unauthorized actions within a trusted session. This could compromise sensitive data and system integrity.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update provided by IBM to address CVE-2026-4919.

Implement Content Security Policy (CSP) headers to mitigate the impact of cross-site scripting vulnerabilities.

title: CVE-2026-41179 - Rclone is a command-line program to sync files and directories to and from different cloud storage p
description: Rclone is a command-line program to sync files and directories to and from different cloud storage providers. Starting in version 1.48.0 and prior to version 1.73.5, the RC endpoint `operations/fsinfo` is exposed without `AuthRequired: true` and accepts attacker-controlled `fs` input. Because `rc.GetFs(...)` supports inline backend definitions, an unauthenticated attacker can instantiate an attacker-controlled backend on demand. For the WebDAV backend, `bearer_token_command` is executed during backend initialization, making single-request unauthenticated local command execution possible on reachable RC deployments without global HTTP authentication. Version 1.73.5 patches the issue.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41179.

title: CVE-2026-41176 - Rclone is a command-line program to sync files and directories to and from different cloud storage p
description: Rclone is a command-line program to sync files and directories to and from different cloud storage providers. The RC endpoint `options/set` is exposed without `AuthRequired: true`, but it can mutate global runtime configuration, including the RC option block itself. Starting in version 1.45.0 and prior to version 1.73.5, an unauthenticated attacker can set `rc.NoAuth=true`, which disables the authorization gate for many RC methods registered with `AuthRequired: true` on reachable RC servers that are started without global HTTP authentication. This can lead to unauthorized access to sensitive administrative functionality, including configuration and operational RC methods. Version 1.73.5 patches the issue.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41176.

title: CVE-2026-32679 - The installers of LiveOn Meet Client for Windows (Downloader5Installer.exe and Downloader5InstallerF
description: The installers of LiveOn Meet Client for Windows (Downloader5Installer.exe and Downloader5InstallerForAdmin.exe) and the installers of Canon Network Camera Plugin (CanonNWCamPlugin.exe and CanonNWCamPluginForAdmin.exe) insecurely load Dynamic Link Libraries (DLLs).
